name: Revium Rx.
business: Revium Rx is a pre-clinical stage biopharmaceutical company developing nanoparticle-based therapies for antimicrobial resistance, solid tumors, and vaccination. Its lead candidate, Nano-Mupirocin, is a liposomal formulation of mupirocin for systemic treatment of antibiotic-resistant infections. The company has not yet commercialized any products.

exposures.sentence: We are a pre-clinical stage biopharmaceutical company focused on the development and eventual commercialization of innovative and proprietary nanoparticle-based therapies.
Our programs are focused on infectious diseases, including antibiotic-resistant infections, solid tumors and a novel approach to vaccination.

We leverage advanced lipid-based delivery systems with the aim of enhancing the safety, efficacy, and clinical utility of established therapeutics, while also exploring potential new uses for existing compounds.

catalysts.event: Completion of GLP toxicology studies for Nano-Mupirocin
catalysts.sentence: GLP toxicology studies are ongoing and are currently expected to be completed by May 2026, subject to change;

catalysts.event: Initiation of Phase 1 clinical trial for Nano-Mupirocin in Israel (timing subject to operational, regulatory, and financial considerations)
catalysts.sentence: We have received approval from the Israeli Ministry of Health to initiate a Phase 1 clinical trial in Israel; however, the timing and conduct of such trial remain subject to operational, regulatory, and financial considerations.
It is expected to resume in Q4 2025 and conclude in the second quarter of 2026.
It is expected to resume in Q4 2025 and conclude in the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: New patent filings for LPLT platform

catalysts.sentence: The Company intends to evaluate results from a planned large-animal safety study originally scheduled for the fourth quarter of 2025 and now rescheduled to the second half of 2026 before determining whether to exercise the license option

tamClaims.claim: U.S. Total Addressable Market for ceftriaxone-resistant gonorrhea is approximately $55 million per year.
Global Total Addressable Market for ceftriaxone-resistant gonorrhea is approximately $220 million per year.
Serviceable Obtainable Market for ceftriaxone-resistant gonorrhea at 30% global penetration is approximately $70 million per year.
tamClaims.sentence: ~$70M/year realistic revenue potential at 30% global penetration of the addressable market for Ceftriaxone-Resistant Gonorrhea

tamClaims.claim: U.S. Total Addressable Market for invasive MRSA is approximately $230 million per year.
tamClaims.sentence: U.S. TAM for invasive infections: - 106,000 $2,200 = ~$230 million/year

tamClaims.claim: Global Total Addressable Market for invasive MRSA is approximately $690 million per year.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate the global market at roughly 3 times the size of the U.S. market at around $690 million.

tamClaims.claim: Global Serviceable Obtainable Market for invasive MRSA at 20% market penetration is approximately $130 million per year.
tamClaims.sentence: Estimated global annual realistic revenue potential at 20% market penetration, which represents serviceable obtainable market (SOM): ~$130+ million
